writer.name: 乔治·怀利·保罗·亨特 George Wylie Paul Hunt

director.name: 乔治·怀利·保罗·亨特 George Wylie Paul Hunt

this_title: Taking the Long View: The Life of Shiing-shen Chern
trans_title: 山长水远：陈省身的一生
introduction: Taking the Long View: The Life of Shiing-shen Chern (2010) examines the life of a remarkable mathematician whose formidable mathematical contributions were matched by an approach and vision that helped build bridges between China and the West. Shiing-shen Chern is portrayed as a man who dedicated his life to pure mathematics with the style of a classical Chinese sage.
chinese_title: 山长水远：陈省身的一生
foreign_title: Taking the Long View: The Life of Shiing-shen Chern
